name: ActualConversion
description: Developer of data insights software designed to make better business decisions. The company's platform collects data generated by various marketing platforms used by a business, then filters and normalizes that data into a universal language with relevant business insights and recommendations, enabling businesses to streamline their marketing campaigns.

name: Adapty
description: Developer of a service platform designed to analyze and grow mobile in-app subscriptions. The company offers a set of tools to remotely change in-app paywalls, send discounts in push notifications, and track subscription events along with other features, enabling mobile developers and marketers to increase the conversion rate of paid subscribers and manage subscription infrastructure.

name: Cakeshop
description: Operator of a skincare marketplace intended to empower the skincare journey. The company's marketplace provides recommendations, trail sampling, and connects for advice from skin influencers, aestheticians, and dermatologists, enabling customers to have a constant guide for their skincare regime.

name: AVATOUR, Imeve
description: Developer of remote collaboration platform designed to conduct remote inspections, training, and other site-specific meetings. The company's software allows users to share a real place where they can see the entire environment and interact with each other, enabling remote users to effectively participate in site meetings and save time and money.

name: AvoMD
description: Operator of a no-code technology platform intended for making clinical content actionable at the point of care. The company's software offers physicians the knowledge they need through a unique clinician user interface and has been shown to dramatically increase clinical guideline usability and usage, enabling healthcare organizations to digitize their clinical pathways/content and put them in the hands of providers instantly.

name: CloutJam
description: Global infrastructure for the next generation of content-driven, creator-led marketing.

name: Drover AI
description: Developer of micro-mobility technologies designed to elevate the micro-mobility industry and tie into the smart city eco-systems. The company develops an advanced IoT module for micro-mobility vehicles that is capable of granular infrastructure distinction in real-time without the need for ground truth information or precise GPS and can accurately and reliably identify sidewalks, streets, and bike lanes, enabling cities to manage regulatory compliance across multiple operators simultaneously and users to navigate without hassle.

name: EcoCart
description: Developer of sustainable shopping applications designed to make fighting climate change simple, cost-effective and accessible. The company's application calculates and eliminates the carbon footprint of online orders, pops a notification about participating stores and provides points that can be redeemed for gift cards or to make an important impact on the planet, enabling e-commerce brands and consumers to offset the environmental repercussions of their orders while shopping at their favorite stores.

name: EMTECH
description: Developer of cloud-based software designed to provide central banks with scalable and resilient digital infrastructure. The company offers digital regulatory sandboxes for multi-party collaborative workflows, digital cash, and digital currency integrators for cross-border integration among others, enabling central banks to modernize operations and improve efficiency.

name: JusticeText
description: Developer of video evidence management software designed for criminal defense attorneys. The company's video evidence transcription tool offers features such as speaker recognition, timestamped notes, video clipping, accuracy heat map, exporting transcripts, and editing transcripts of body camera footage, interrogation videos, and jail calls, enabling public defenders to deliver fairer outcomes in the criminal justice system.

name: Kiira
description: Operator of an AI-based telehealth platform designed to meet women's healthcare needs. The company's platform connects users with trusted primary care physicians, obstetrics, gynecologist, nurses, and therapists, enabling women to get expert advice about personal health problems.

name: MeetAsh
description: Operator of a software and logistics remote diagnostics company intended to offer at-home self-collected diagnostic testing services. The company integrates with clients so that they can offer at-home testing kits on behalf of patients to collect samples at home and send them back to partner labs, that are reviewed by licensed clinicians, thereby enabling customers to access remote diagnostics with secure infrastructure or preferred tech stack.

name: MemeChat
description: Developer of an online platform intended to help meme creators receive remuneration from brands for their content. The company's platform leverages technology to provide a space for users to express themselves in the form of memes on a plethora of issues and also for brands to access those memes, enabling creators to create memes using paid templates and get paid upon their approval or earn making memes in the requested category and get paid.

name: MightyFly
description: Provider of logistics and supply chain services intended to serve medical, spare parts, mining, defense, remote and oil and gas industries. The company connects remote locations together with long-range and heavy cargo aircraft, as well as express, customized aerial drone delivery services and provides rapid and efficient package transport, enabling clients with expedited deliveries that are cheaper and faster.

name: Momo Project
description: Developer of an Artificial intelligence (AI) based Pet Nanny intended to provide personalized information and recommendations to save pet parents time and energy. The company offers comprehensive pet community service by leveraging user data to create a community-based database and offers a well-balanced diet recommendation that fits the nutrition needs of pets based on the details of the dog breed, enabling pet owners to spend more quality time with their pets.

name: My China Roots
description: We empower Asians to trace their ancestry and connect with roots & relatives; starting with Overseas Chinese.

name: Pariti
description: Developer of a talent network platform intended to connect businesses in emerging markets with talent. The company's marketplace connects startups, capital, and global experts in emerging markets, and provides advisory and consulting services, enabling startups to hire new talent and raise capital.

name: Pawsh
description: Developer of a pet grooming application designed to make the pet care delivery system transparent and friendly. The company's application connects users with top-rated and vetted pet grooming experts who come directly to their homes for a delightful grooming session, enabling pet owners to groom their pets easily and witness the grooming process from start to finish, and be satisfied with the way grooming services are performed.

name: Penfield.AI
description: Developer of a cybersecurity platform designed to enhance security operations through process automation and performance optimization. The company's platform equips security teams with AI-powered tools for process standardization, bottleneck analysis and personalized automation, enabling clients to streamline workflows, optimize performance and elevate overall security posture.

name: Invidica
description: Rerouting search engine sales into retail stores.

name: Ryu
description: Developer of an online gaming platform designed to facilitate real-money tournaments in online video game matches of skill. The company's platform uses blockchain to store tournament results, handle payments, and encrypt sensitive user data, enabling game developers to quickly craft games the way they want them to.

name: Sendspark
description: Developer of a video outreach platform designed to connect and engage with customers. The company's platform features tools to record videos from a browser, customize landing pages, share via email or a public uniform resource locator, and track analytics, enabling businesses to accelerate and develop connections with their customers.

name: Stack
description: Developer of internet launchpad software designed to offer an unlimited split-screen view. The company's software increases the efficiency of working with the web for the average internet user by allowing simultaneous use of multiple web applications within a neatly organized working environment as well as unifying notifications, enabling clients to boost productivity and get protection from unwanted threats.

name: Workclass
description: Operator of an online job search platform intended to serve blue-collar workers. The company offers to help match employers with relevant workers as well as provides a portal for candidates to search and find jobs matching their skills, enabling individuals to search for jobs as well as provide companies access to resumes and hire matching candidates.

name: Vibely
description: Developer and operator of a social networking platform designed to create communities and make friendships. The company's platform arranges self-organized local events, casual meetups and parties, enabling influencers to increase engagement with followers while monetizing with participation fees and membership dues.
